name: Dicker Data Limited
analysis: DDR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.5500. Trade idea: entry A$11.6900, stop A$9.5733, target A$18.0401 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
